calendar.matters:
Court'S Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: no appearance by appellant. respondent's attorney, vivian lerche, was present for the hearing. matter is submitted.

Court'S Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Off Calendar

Re-Notice Mtn To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-06-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JASON CHOU OF THE LAW FIRM OF HUNT & HENRIQUES, TEL. NO. (408) 414-0365 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LISA ALEXANDER'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment is denied. Defendant fails to demonstrate mistake, inadvertence, or excusable neglect and the motion is untimely under CCP 473. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302

Motion To Set Aside Judgment- Notice
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LISA ALEXANDER'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment is taken off calendar. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Judgment was stricken pursuant to the Court's Order dated January 5, 2015. Defendant needs to renotice motion since payment was made. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Denied

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Lisa C. Alexander, Tel. 415.272.8520, defendant and moving party appearing on her own behalf,
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Because defendant did not give proper notice that she is contesting the tentative ruling, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LISA ALEXANDER'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Off calendar. The court previously continued this matter to obtain courtesy copies of the moving papers and those courtesy copies were never provided. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Continued To Jul-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LISA ALEXANDER's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to July 24, 2014, to give all parties a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. All parties are to provide courtesy copies of their papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Citibank, N.A.
Copy of Declaration by Witness Richard Cameron filed 04-11-12 presented in open court.
No appearance by Defendants Eduardo Rojas, Reina Argueta and Lucero Herrera.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Damages $8681.43
Costs $284.00, for a total of $8965.43
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Set For Trial On May-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
